_meta.title: pre_processing_confidence_score
_meta.runtime_independence: Computed entirely from pre-processing artifacts (geotagged images, GCP coord file, CP coord file) + processing manifest + optional processing report + external sources. Does not read drone_score, base_station_score, gcp_score, or check_point_score outputs at runtime.
_meta.design_summary: Four-block evidence-based pre-processing confidence chain with separate verification_status field. CBMI does not perform processing — chain evaluates artifacts and declared/optional processing provenance. Tiered evidence with graceful degradation when reports are not uploaded. Path-aware indicators evaluate only when their applies_to_paths matches the operator-declared workflow. CP-related quality reported as verification_status rather than gating the score — surveys can be high-quality without check points.
_meta.change_summary: v1.1 adds three per-artifact scores as views over existing indicators: geotag_artifact_score, gcp_coord_artifact_score, cp_coord_artifact_score. Adds 4 new indicators for CP-numeric scoring (used by cp_coord_artifact_score AND verification_status). Adds 10 new flags for CP-specific thresholds. NO CHANGES to v1.0 indicator weights, block structure, pre_processing_score formula, or verification_status logic.

pre_processing_score.workflow: Evidence-based (CBMI does not perform processing; chain evaluates artifacts + manifest)
pre_processing_score.aggregator: block-of-blocks; within-block weighted averages with redistribution when evidence absent or path-N/A
pre_processing_score.global_gate_action: Sets pre_processing_score = 0. The named flag fires with severity CATASTROPHIC.
pre_processing_score.verification_status_field: Separate categorical field reporting CP-related quality. VALUES: VERIFIED, UNVERIFIED_NO_CPS, UNVERIFIED_INSUFFICIENT_CPS, UNVERIFIED_CP_CLUSTERED, UNVERIFIED_CP_NOT_INDEPENDENT, UNVERIFIED_CP_TRUST_LOW. NEVER score-gating. PP_NO_INDEPENDENT_VERIFICATION flag (CRITICAL-informational) fires when verification_status != VERIFIED. Reasoning: surveys can be high-quality without check points; absence of verification does not invalidate the survey quality.
pre_processing_score.null_handling: No null state. Score always computes from the four scoring blocks. The CP situation is reported via verification_status, not as a null.
pre_processing_score.scope_note: Evidence-based confidence score for pre-processing outputs. CBMI does NOT perform processing — this chain evaluates artifacts (geotagged images, GCP coord file, CP coord file) and a declared processing manifest. Optional processing report deepens diagnostic depth. Runtime-independent of drone_score, base_station_score, gcp_score, check_point_score — does not read their outputs. Cross-subsystem coupling (e.g., "CP reliability degraded by base risk") belongs in future capture_score.
pre_processing_score.source_file_set: Geotagged image set, GCP coord file, CP coord file, processing manifest. Optional processing report.
pre_processing_score.paths_supported: AUTONOMOUS / PUBLISHED_BENCHMARK / CORS / CLOUD / CUSTOMER_SUPPLIED / LOCAL_BASE_PPK (path-aware indicators only evaluate when their applies_to_paths matches)
pre_processing_score.known_limitations: False fix / antenna PCO errors that do not manifest in σ are NOT detectable from artifact evidence alone — caught downstream at processing-stage check-point residuals. Processing-report-dependent indicators (cors_data_continuity, time_sync_residual, gcp_residual, cors_station_health) score as advisory only when report is not uploaded — operational reality is that reports are not reliably uploaded. Settings-actuality validation requires uploaded processing report (Approach 2). Without report, chain validates declared settings only (Approach 1) — operator-declarative misrepresentation not detectable. Approach 3 (independent project-type validation against expected settings) deferred to v2 — requires CBMI to maintain expected-settings reference per project type. Software-version scoring deferred to v2 (SD5) — v1 carries known-buggy-versions flag as advisory only with zero scoring weight; real scoring when CBMI maintains buggy-version list. Approximately 6 of the 42 catalogued problems are NOT detected by pre_processing_score: target washed away (handed to processing_score), stockpile toe ambiguity (handed to volume analytics), monsoon flight artifacts (cross-handoff to drone chain), and others. Documented in problem_coverage_map. Vegetation DTM unreliability is an inherent photogrammetry limitation — chain documents but cannot remove. Undisclosed site localization not detectable from artifact evidence — only detectable when operator addresses it in manifest (declared-only). CRS/projection sanity checks compare against survey bounding box for plausibility; cannot verify absolute correctness when bounding box itself is in wrong frame.

building_blocks.question: Are all artifacts in the same, declared, correct reference frame?
building_blocks.operator_action: Verify CRS/datum/geoid/projection/units declarations match project requirement
building_blocks.indicators_within: ref_frame_declared_score(0.30), geoid_model_declared_score(0.20), height_mode_declared_score(0.15), projection_declared_score(0.10), output_crs_metadata_score(0.10), units_declared_score(0.05), customer_coord_crs_declared_score(0.05), localization_disclosed_score(0.03), provenance_consistency_score(0.02)

building_blocks.question: Are the geotagged images trustworthy as photogrammetry input?
building_blocks.failure_owner: Drone PPK processing software + base/CORS data
building_blocks.operator_action: Reprocess with correct base/CORS pairing; verify per-image solution status
building_blocks.aggregator: weighted average of indicator scores (with weight redistribution when evidence absent)
building_blocks.indicators_within: base_pairing_score(0.25), geotag_solution_quality_score(0.20), geotag_completeness_score(0.15), geotag_baseline_score(0.10), session_overlap_score(0.10), overlap_texture_score(0.08), antenna_pco_score(0.05), sensor_metadata_consistency_score(0.03), cors_data_continuity_score(0.02), time_sync_residual_score(0.01), monsoon_flight_artifact_score(0.01)

building_blocks.question: Are the GCP coordinates trustworthy as absolute-accuracy anchors?
building_blocks.failure_owner: GCP processing software + processing path selection
building_blocks.operator_action: Reprocess via PPK/CORS; require customer accuracy declaration
building_blocks.aggregator: weighted average; GCT1 σ uses mean − 0.25 × (100 − min) across GCPs internally
building_blocks.indicators_within: gcp_sigma_score(0.30), gcp_processing_path_score(0.25), gcp_customer_accuracy_declared_score(0.15), gcp_id_reconciliation_score(0.10), gcp_coord_age_score(0.10), coord_parse_sanity_score(0.05), gcp_residual_score(0.03), cors_station_health_score(0.02)

building_blocks.question: Was the GCP layout adequate for the site extent?
building_blocks.operator_action: Deploy additional GCPs; redistribute; ensure target visibility

indicators.threshold_summary: declared CRS/datum matches project across all artifacts → 100; mismatch → 0 + FLAG: PP_WRONG_CRS_DATUM.
declared geoid matches project + consistent across artifacts → 100; mismatch → 0 + FLAG: PP_GEOID_MISMATCH.
all artifacts same height_mode AND matches project → 100; inconsistent → 30 + FLAG: PP_HEIGHT_MODE_INCONSISTENT; project mismatch → 0 + FLAG: PP_HEIGHT_MODE_WRONG.
projection consistent with site bounding box → 100; mismatch → 0 + FLAG: PP_WRONG_PROJECTION.
CRS metadata present in each artifact AND matches declared → 100; missing → 50 + FLAG: PP_OUTPUT_CRS_MISSING; mismatch → 0 + FLAG: PP_OUTPUT_CRS_MISMATCH.
units declared + match project + consistent → 100; mismatch → 0 + FLAG: PP_UNITS_MISMATCH.

customer-supplied GCP file declares CRS + matches project → 100; missing → 30 + FLAG: PP_CUSTOMER_COORDS_NO_CRS; mismatch → 0 + FLAG: PP_CUSTOMER_COORDS_WRONG_CRS. N/A when not customer-supplied (weight redistributes).
localization disclosed (whether applied or not) → 100; not disclosed → 60 + FLAG: PP_LOCALIZATION_UNDISCLOSED (HIGH).
all control declares same realization/epoch → 100; mixed → 50 + FLAG: PP_MIXED_PROVENANCE.

indicators.justification: SHEET (silent CATASTROPHIC inside block — heavily weighted)
indicators.threshold_summary: drone session within base window AND base_file_id matches → 100; outside OR mismatched → 0 + FLAG: PP_WRONG_BASE_PAIRED.
fraction Q=1 ≥0.95 → 100; 0.80-0.95 → 70 + FLAG: PP_GEOTAG_PARTIAL_FIX; <0.80 → 30 + FLAG: PP_GEOTAG_POOR_FIX; <0.50 → 0 + FLAG: PP_GEOTAG_NOT_FIXED.
≥0.99 → 100; 0.95-0.99 → 80; 0.80-0.95 → 50 + FLAG: PP_GEOTAGS_INCOMPLETE; <0.80 → 0 + FLAG: PP_GEOTAGS_SEVERELY_INCOMPLETE.
≤5km → 100; 5-10km → 88; 10-20km → 70 + FLAG: PP_LONG_BASELINE; 20-40km → 40 + FLAG: PP_EXCESSIVE_BASELINE; >40km → 20.
=1.0 → 100; 0.95-1.0 → 80; 0.80-0.95 → 50 + FLAG: PP_PARTIAL_BASE_OVERLAP; <0.80 → 30 + FLAG: PP_INSUFFICIENT_OVERLAP.
declared overlap ≥75/65 → 100; 65-75/55-65 → 70; <65/<55 → 40 + FLAG: PP_SPARSE_TIEPOINTS_RISK. Tie-point density (report) replaces declared when available.
match → 100; mismatch → 50 + FLAG: PP_ANTENNA_PCO_MISMATCH.
EXIF camera = manifest = flight log → 100; any mismatch → 50 + FLAG: PP_SENSOR_METADATA_MISMATCH.
continuous → 100; minor gaps → 70 + FLAG: PP_CORS_MINOR_GAP; major gaps → 30 + FLAG: PP_CORS_MAJOR_GAP. Advisory when report absent (weight redistributes within block).
<100ms → 100; 100ms-1s → 70 + FLAG: PP_TIME_SYNC_DRIFT; >1s → 30 + FLAG: PP_TIME_SYNC_SEVERE. Advisory when report absent.
declared adverse → flag PP_FLIGHT_CONDITION_RISK (advisory) → 70; clear → 100. Cross-handoff to drone chain documented.

indicators.justification: SHEET (primary trust anchor — per-point with mean − k·worst)
indicators.threshold_summary: per-GCP: σ_h ≤ target → 100; 1-2× → 70 + FLAG: PP_GCP_SIGMA_MARGINAL; 2-5× → 30 + FLAG: PP_GCP_SIGMA_HIGH; >5× → 0 + FLAG: PP_GCP_SIGMA_REJECT. Aggregated via mean − 0.25 × (100 − min).

indicators.gate_action: GCP Coord Trust block = 0; FLAG: PP_GCP_AUTONOMOUS_PATH (CATASTROPHIC). Zeros pre_processing_score.
indicators.threshold_summary: AUTONOMOUS → 0 + FLAG: PP_GCP_AUTONOMOUS_PATH; LOCAL_BASE_PPK / CORS / CLOUD / PUBLISHED_BENCHMARK → 100; CUSTOMER_SUPPLIED → GCT3 takes over.

declared + meets target → 100; declared but inadequate → 30 + FLAG: PP_GCP_CUSTOMER_INADEQUATE; not declared → 30 + FLAG: PP_GCP_CUSTOMER_NO_ACCURACY_CLAIM (CRITICAL reviewer-blocking). N/A when not customer-supplied (weight redistributes).
all match → 100; minor → 70 + FLAG: PP_GCP_ID_PARTIAL_MISMATCH; major → 30 + FLAG: PP_GCP_ID_MISMATCH.
<30d → 100; 30-180d → 80; 180-365d → 50 + FLAG: PP_GCP_COORDS_AGED; >365d → 30 + FLAG: PP_GCP_COORDS_STALE. N/A when not customer-supplied.
parsed coords within declared bounding box → 100; out-of-box / axis-swap signature → 0 + FLAG: PP_COORD_MISPARSE.
all within tolerance → 100; few outliers → 70 + FLAG: PP_GCP_RESIDUAL_OUTLIERS; many → 30 + FLAG: PP_GCP_RESIDUAL_FAILURES. Advisory when report absent (weight redistributes within block).
good → 100; degraded → 50 + FLAG: PP_CORS_STATION_DEGRADED; poor → 0 + FLAG: PP_CORS_STATION_UNHEALTHY. Advisory when report absent.
adequate ratio → 100; marginal → 70 + FLAG: PP_GCP_COUNT_MARGINAL; insufficient → 30 + FLAG: PP_GCP_COUNT_INSUFFICIENT.
≥80% extent coverage → 100; partial → 60 + FLAG: PP_GCP_CLUSTERED; severely clustered → 30 + FLAG: PP_GCP_SEVERELY_CLUSTERED.
≥3 px → 100; 2-3 → 60 + FLAG: PP_TARGET_MARGINAL; <2 → 30 + FLAG: PP_TARGET_INVISIBLE.
vegetated + DTM-claimed → 30 + FLAG: PP_VEG_DTM_UNRELIABLE (advisory); else 100.

indicators.justification: SHEET (v1: advisory only; v2 once buggy-list maintained)
indicators.threshold_summary: v1: declared → 100; in buggy list → flag PP_BUGGY_SOFTWARE_VERSION (advisory, zero scoring weight in v1). v2: real scoring.
manifest-declared settings match processing-report-actual → 100; mismatch → 30 + FLAG: PP_SETTINGS_DECLARED_ACTUAL_MISMATCH. Advisory only when report absent (weight redistributes within block).

indicators.justification: SHEET (parallels gcp_sigma_score; per-point primary with mean − 0.25 × (100 − min))
indicators.threshold_summary: per-CP: σ_h ≤ accuracy_target → 100; 1-2× → 70 + FLAG: PP_CP_SIGMA_MARGINAL; 2-5× → 30 + FLAG: PP_CP_SIGMA_HIGH; >5× → 0 + FLAG: PP_CP_SIGMA_REJECT. Aggregated mean − 0.25 × (100 − min) across all CPs.
cp_count ≥20 → 100; 10-19 → 80; 5-9 → 60 + FLAG: PP_CP_COUNT_STATISTICAL_WEAK; 1-4 → 30 + FLAG: PP_CP_COUNT_INSUFFICIENT; 0 → 0 + FLAG: PP_NO_CHECK_POINTS.
CP coverage ≥80% of extent → 100; 60-80% → 70 + FLAG: PP_CP_CLUSTERED; <60% → 30 + FLAG: PP_CP_SEVERELY_CLUSTERED.

indicators.justification: SHEET (tunable threshold — correlation length scales with GSD/density/terrain)
indicators.threshold_summary: min CP-GCP distance ≥50m → 100; 10-50m → 70 + FLAG: PP_CP_GCP_TOO_CLOSE; <10m → 30 + FLAG: PP_CP_GCP_OVERLAPPING.

derived_fields.meaning: Whether declared CRS/datum matches project requirement across all artifacts. Hard-gate input.

derived_fields.formula_expression: declared_geoid_per_artifact == project_required_geoid AND consistent across artifacts
derived_fields.meaning: Geoid declaration matches project and is internally consistent.

derived_fields.formula_expression: all artifacts declare same height_mode AND matches project_required_height_mode
derived_fields.meaning: Height mode internal consistency + match to project.

derived_fields.formula_expression: declared_projection consistent with survey site bounding box (zone correct)
derived_fields.meaning: Projection sanity check against site coordinates. Hard-gate input.

derived_fields.formula_expression: each output artifact has CRS metadata AND matches declared_crs_per_artifact
derived_fields.meaning: Direct artifact evidence — CRS metadata in EXIF/coord-file headers.
Units consistency + match to project.

derived_fields.formula_expression: when CUSTOMER_SUPPLIED path: customer_supplied_coord_crs declared AND matches project
derived_fields.meaning: Applies only on customer-supplied path; N/A otherwise.

derived_fields.formula_expression: localization_applied_declared IS NOT NULL (operator addressed it, regardless of True/False)
derived_fields.meaning: Fires flag on undisclosed only — not on declared-localized.
All control sources use same ITRF realization and epoch.

derived_fields.formula_expression: (drone_session_start_utc >= base_session_start_utc) AND (drone_session_end_utc <= base_session_end_utc) AND base_file_id matches expected
derived_fields.meaning: PPK base-pairing check.
Fraction of images with FIXED solution. Per-image aggregation.
Fraction of captured images that received geotags.
Fraction of drone flight covered by base/CORS recording.

derived_fields.formula_expression: declared_antenna_per_artifact (manifest) == antenna actually used (from device export when available)
derived_fields.meaning: Antenna PCO declaration vs actual.

derived_fields.formula_expression: camera_serial (EXIF) == camera declared in manifest == camera in flight log
derived_fields.meaning: Cross-artifact sensor consistency.
CORS continuity during flight window — report-dependent.
Time-sync drift magnitude.
Overlap from manifest; tie-point density when report present.
Declared adverse conditions — cross-handoff to drone chain.
Per-GCP σ as multiple of survey accuracy target. Primary trust indicator. Aggregated via mean − 0.25 × (100 − min).
Per-CP σ as multiple of accuracy target. Feeds verification_status.
AUTONOMOUS path → catastrophic gate.

derived_fields.formula_expression: when CUSTOMER_SUPPLIED: customer_accuracy_claim present AND meets accuracy_target_m
derived_fields.meaning: Customer-supplied accuracy adequacy. Reviewer-blocking when absent.

derived_fields.formula_expression: gcp_ids in coord file match gcp_ids in form/manifest
derived_fields.meaning: Cross-artifact ID consistency.
Staleness of customer-supplied GCP coords.

derived_fields.formula_expression: parsed gcp_position falls within reconstruction_extent_polygon (with reasonable margin)
derived_fields.meaning: Bounding-box sanity check catches axis-swap / unit-misparse.
GCP residual outlier detection — report-dependent.
CORS station health during observation window.
GCP count sufficiency.

derived_fields.formula_expression: fraction of reconstruction_extent_polygon covered by GCP convex hull / grid
derived_fields.meaning: Spatial coverage of GCPs vs reconstruction extent.
Target pixel size for ODM detection.
DTM-on-vegetation risk.

derived_fields.formula_expression: when processing report uploaded: report_actual_settings match manifest declarations
derived_fields.meaning: Approach 2: validates manifest-declared settings against processing-report-actual settings. Report-dependent.
v1: advisory only, zero scoring weight. v2: real scoring when list maintained.

derived_fields.formula_expression: count of CP records in CP Coord File
derived_fields.meaning: CP count for verification_status determination.

derived_fields.formula_expression: fraction of reconstruction_extent_polygon covered by CP convex hull
derived_fields.meaning: CP spatial coverage for verification_status.

derived_fields.formula_expression: min pairwise distance from any CP to any GCP
derived_fields.meaning: CP-GCP spatial independence for verification_status.

source_fields.meaning: Per-image identifier (filename/sequence number).
Per-image position from EXIF or sidecar.
Per-image fix quality flag (Q=1 FIXED, Q=2 FLOAT, Q=5 AUTONOMOUS, etc).
Total number of geotagged images in the set.
CRS metadata in EXIF or sidecar.
Image acquisition time from EXIF.
Camera serial number from EXIF — for cross-check vs manifest.
Per-GCP identifier.
Per-GCP processed coordinate.
Per-GCP horizontal σ from processing.
Per-GCP vertical σ from processing.
CRS metadata in the GCP coord file header.
Per-CP identifier.
Per-CP processed coordinate.
Per-CP horizontal σ from processing.
Per-CP vertical σ from processing.
Required CRS / datum for the survey deliverable.
Required geoid model.
Required height mode (orthometric / ellipsoidal).
Required linear units (m / US Survey ft / Intl ft).
Required projection (zone, false-easting/northing).
Survey accuracy target (e.g., 0.02 m for cm-grade).
CRS declared per artifact (geotag / GCP / CP).
Geoid model declared per artifact.
Height mode declared per artifact.
Units declared per artifact.
Projection declared.
ITRF realization and epoch declared per artifact.
Boolean: was site localization applied? Required field — undisclosed (null) → flag fires.
CRS declaration for customer-supplied coordinates.
Customer-supplied accuracy claim (with vs without value).
Path category for drone PPK: LOCAL_BASE_PPK / CORS / CLOUD / OTHER.
Path category for GCP: AUTONOMOUS / LOCAL_BASE_PPK / CORS / CLOUD / PUBLISHED_BENCHMARK / CUSTOMER_SUPPLIED.
Path category for CP (mostly inherited from capture).
Software used per artifact (TBC / Emlid Studio / RTKLIB / Cloud / Custom).
Software version.
Antenna model declared per artifact (for PCO).
Distance from drone/GCP rover to base/CORS.
Count of images captured (for completeness check vs geotag_count).
Declared forward overlap (%).
Declared side overlap (%).
Declared site ground cover (open / vegetated / mixed).
Boolean: is DTM in the project deliverables?
Declared GCP/CP target physical size.
Planned ground sample distance.
Target physical type.
Identifier for the base RINEX file used in PPK.
Drone flight start (UTC).
Drone flight end (UTC).
Base recording start (UTC).
Base recording end (UTC).
Date GCP coordinates were determined (for staleness check).
Date of drone flight (for delta to coord-determination date).
Surveyed reconstruction extent (area).
Geometry of reconstruction extent for distribution checks.
Declared flight conditions (clear / hazy / monsoon / thermal-prone).
From processing report: CORS coverage during drone flight window.
From processing report: drone-base time-sync residual statistics.
From processing report: per-GCP residuals from adjustment.
From processing report: CORS station health during obs window.
From processing report: settings actually used (datum, geoid, antenna, tolerances).
From processing report: tie-point density measurements.

source_files.physical_source: Output of drone PPK processing in TBC / Emlid Studio / RTKLIB / cloud
source_files.how_to_obtain: Pre-processing produces geotagged images with embedded position (EXIF GPS tags or sidecar file). CBMI reads geotag position, per-image fix status, count, CRS metadata, timestamps.
source_files.notes: Per-image artifact. Q-flag conventions are software-agnostic (Q=1 = FIXED). When sidecar accompanies image, may include per-image σ.

source_files.physical_source: Output of GCP coordinate processing (PPK / CORS / cloud / customer-supplied)
source_files.how_to_obtain: Pre-processing produces per-GCP coordinates with σ values. CBMI reads per-point ID, position, σ_h, σ_v.
source_files.notes: Per-point structure. σ is the universal anchor for trust scoring.

source_files.physical_source: Output of check-point coordinate processing (mostly inherited from RTK capture)
source_files.how_to_obtain: Per-CP coordinates with σ values. Feeds verification_status, not pre_processing_score.
source_files.notes: When absent (no CPs designated) → verification_status=UNVERIFIED_NO_CPS; pre_processing_score still computes from other blocks.

source_files.physical_source: Filled by operator at survey upload
source_files.how_to_obtain: Operator declares path categories, software/version, CRS/datum/geoid/height-mode, baseline, mountpoints, antenna models, accuracy targets, customer-supplied accuracy claims. Required for declared_manifest tier indicators.
source_files.notes: Manifest design bounds what the chain can detect. Approach 1 baked in here. Operator-declarative (not verified against actuality unless processing report present).

source_files.file_extensions: .pdf / .xml / .txt (TBC adjustment report / Emlid Studio log / RTKLIB status)
source_files.physical_source: Generated by processing software during pre-processing
source_files.how_to_obtain: Operator uploads optionally. When present, enables detailed_manifest_with_report tier indicators (CORS continuity, time-sync, settings consistency, GCP residuals, CORS station health). When absent, those indicators score as advisory only.
source_files.notes: v1: TBC parser baked in. Emlid Studio and RTKLIB parsers deferred to v2. Report-absent reality: not reliably uploaded.

flags.meaning: Declared CRS/datum does not match project requirement. Zeros pre_processing_score.
Declared projection inconsistent with survey location. Zeros pre_processing_score.
GCP processing path declared as AUTONOMOUS — unfit for survey-grade control. Zeros pre_processing_score via gcp_coord_trust_score=0.
Geoid model mismatch with project or inconsistent across artifacts.
Height mode declarations disagree across artifacts.
Height mode mismatch with project.
Output artifact missing CRS metadata.
Output artifact CRS metadata disagrees with declared CRS.
Declared units mismatch with project or inconsistent.
Customer-supplied GCP coordinates without CRS declaration.
Customer-supplied GCPs declared in wrong CRS.
Site localization disclosure missing from manifest.
Control sources use different ITRF realizations or epochs.
Approach 2 check: manifest declarations contradict processing-report actuals. Report-dependent.

flags.condition: drone_session not within base window OR base_file_id mismatch
flags.meaning: Wrong base RINEX paired with drone PPK — silent within-block CAT.
Partial PPK fix across geotag set.
Poor PPK fix across geotag set.
Less than half of geotags achieved FIXED solution.
Geotag count below captured image count.
Severe geotag gap — many images without position.
Distance-dependent error baked into geotags.
Excessive baseline — accuracy claim should be downgraded.
Partial overlap between drone flight and base recording.
Drone flight largely outside base recording window.
Overlap insufficient for low-texture terrain — mining-specific.
Declared antenna model mismatches device-actual.
EXIF / manifest / flight-log camera disagreement.
CORS data has minor gaps during flight (report-dependent).
CORS data has major gaps during flight (report-dependent).
Time-sync drift detected (report-dependent).
Severe time-sync drift (report-dependent).
Declared adverse flight conditions; cross-handoff to drone chain.
GCP σ at 1-2× target.
GCP σ at 2-5× target.
GCP σ catastrophically high — point not usable as control.
Customer-declared GCP accuracy claim inadequate for project.
Customer-supplied GCPs without accuracy claim — reviewer-blocking.

flags.condition: minor ID mismatches between coord file and form
flags.meaning: Some GCP IDs disagree between coord file and form.
GCP ID disagreement is major — provenance integrity questioned.
Customer-supplied GCP coordinates aging — marks may have moved.
Customer-supplied GCP coordinates stale.

flags.condition: parsed coords outside declared bounding box
flags.meaning: Axis-swap or decimal misparse detected via bounding-box sanity.
GCP residual outliers in processing report.
Multiple GCP residual failures.
CORS station had degraded performance during obs window.
CORS station unhealthy during obs window.
GCP count is borderline for site extent.
GCP count insufficient for site extent.
GCPs not well-distributed across reconstruction extent.
GCPs severely clustered.
Target borderline visible at planned GSD.
Target too small at planned GSD — likely undetectable.
Vegetated site with DTM in deliverables — DTM is canopy, not terrain.
Software version with known bugs (v1: catalogued only; v2: scored).
Survey was not independently verified. Score still valid but unverified — see verification_status field.
Target washed away — detected at processing stage via ODM. Documented as known limitation.
Stockpile toe/base-plane ambiguity. Cross-handoff to volume analytics.
CP σ at 1-2× target — marginal verification quality.
CP σ at 2-5× target — degraded verification quality.
CP σ catastrophically high — point not usable for verification.
CP count below statistical sufficiency threshold for defensible RMSE claim.
Very few check points — RMSE claim statistically indefensible.
CPs partially clustered geographically.
CPs severely clustered — verification limited to local area.
CPs not spatially independent — within correlation length of GCPs.
CPs essentially co-located with GCPs — independence catastrophically compromised.
No designated check points. cp_coord_artifact_score = null. verification_status = UNVERIFIED_NO_CPS. pre_processing_score unaffected.

problem_coverage_map.problem: Output CRS Metadata Missing or Wrong
Drone Session Times Don't Align with Base
CP Not Spatially Independent from GCPs
Wrong Base File Paired with Drone PPK
Software Settings Declared vs Actual Mismatch
problem_coverage_map.covered_by: settings_consistency_score + PP_SETTINGS_DECLARED_ACTUAL_MISMATCH (Approach 2; report-dependent; advisory when report absent)
Future volume analytics. PP_STOCKPILE_BOUNDARY_DISPUTE handoff flag.

per_artifact_views.question: Is the geotagged image set fit as a pre-processing output (clean inputs for photogrammetry)?
Is the GCP coordinate file fit as a pre-processing output (clean control input for photogrammetry)?
Is the check-point coordinate file fit as a pre-processing output (independent verification artifact)?
per_artifact_views.null_handling: When cp_designated_count = 0, cp_coord_artifact_score = null. Verification_status reports UNVERIFIED_NO_CPS. The pre_processing_score is unaffected (already locked).
